title: Skins 3D
description: A visual enhancement modpack that adds high-quality 3D models, improved textures, and upgraded player skins.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08560213fd44777f9ed723f16e2ef639b998ad1e.png)

This modpack transforms Minecraft’s visuals by combining high-quality resource packs, 3D models, and aesthetic enhancements into a single, optimized experience. Blocks and items gain realistic depth thanks to detailed 3D geometry, giving familiar objects new shapes, contours, and shadows. Player skins also receive upgrades, supporting higher resolution, layered textures, and subtle 3D elements that make characters look more vibrant and expressive.

From refined tools and decorative blocks to foliage, structures, and ambient elements, this pack enhances nearly every part of the world while keeping the classic Minecraft identity intact. The goal is simple: make the game visually richer without altering its gameplay.

The modpack includes performance and optimization addons to ensure smooth FPS and stable performance, even with high-resolution models active. Whether you enjoy building, exploring, or creating cinematic worlds, the enhanced visuals offer a more immersive and modern aesthetic with minimal impact on your system.

Perfect for players who want Minecraft to feel more detailed, dynamic, and alive—while still remaining fully vanilla-friendly and compatible with most worlds and servers.
